docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-16-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT LIMA TOBAR, GILBERTO ALEXANDER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-14-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-14-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF EDWIN YOVANI GONZALEZ ESPINOZA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GILBERTO ALEXANDER LIMA TOBAR IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
